CustomField.description: Example: If Entity A owes Entity B money, then an Intercompany Payable is recorded. In this example, Entity A would book a journal entry crediting Intercompany AP with Entity B as the intercompany affiliate tag. The GL account used for the journal entry credit would be the GL account mapped to this field. Logic: The journal entry credit line looks up the intercompany payable account associated with the Intercompany Affiliate entity tagged on the journal line. The intercompany AP account it looks up is this field.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select the intercompany accounts payable GL Account when this entity is an intercompany affiliate on a journal entry.
CustomField.label: Intercompany Affiliate AP GL Account
